title: 12x Invoice Books Notebook- Just Stationery- Job lot- Pages Numbered 1-80
features: 12 x 80 PAGES DUPLICATE INVOICE BOOKS – This note book allows you to basically create an instant copy of what you are writing on a second blank page
EASY TEAR - Each page has a perforated edge for easy tear.
CARBON SHEET INCLUDED – The copy method includes carbon paper to transfer your handwriting.
IDEAL USES – Designed to be used with invoices, receipts & purchase orders. Front page ruled & worded, back duplicate page is blank.
